import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let l1 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing line 1")?
  let l2 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing line 2")?
  let a = string.split_whitespace(l1)
  let b = string.split_whitespace(l2)
  let n = a.len()
  mut k = 0
  while k < n
    let sa = a.get(k).ok_or("oob a")?
    let sb = b.get(k).ok_or("oob b")?
    let i = string.parse_int(sa).ok_or("parse a")?
    let j = string.parse_int(sb).ok_or("parse b")?
    let s = i + j
    println("#{i}+#{j}=#{s}")
    k = k + 1
  end
  Ok(())
end
